title: Clinical and Genetic Analysis of a European Cohort with Pericentral Retinitis Pigmentosa.
author: Karali M Testa F Brunetti-Pierri R Di Iorio V Pizzo M Melillo P Barillari MR Torella A Musacchia F D'Angelo L Banfi S Simonelli F
content: S-EPMC6982348 PMC6982348 Clinical and Genetic Analysis of a European Cohort with Pericentral Retinitis Pigmentosa. Retinitis pigmentosa (RP) is a clinically heterogenous disease that comprises a wide range of phenotypic and genetic subtypes. Pericentral RP is an atypical form of RP characterized
